children.name: hwBulkStatDefineObjects
children.description: The value of this object identifies the number of statistics objects configured in all files.

children.name: hwBulkStatDefineObjectTable
children.description:
Object management table in the bulk file,
                providing add/modify/delete operations.
                Prerequisite for the operation is that the 
                bulk file is listed in the hwBulkStatDefineFileTable.

children.name: hwBulkStatCollectCapability
children.description: The value of this object identifies the collection capability in five minutes.
